channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'Coreano Hermano': Ahead of Mexico vs. South Korea, it's all love between the fans
item.description: It is an unusual sight before a World Cup match: supporters of opposing teams partying together, calling each other brother, some even hoping for a draw.

item.title: 'Rejected': How federal prisons stonewall grievances and deny care for years
item.description: People who go to prison keep one important right: to file a grievance over their treatment, from abuse to denied medical care. But in the vast majority of cases, those complaints are ignored.

item.title: Trump told ships to 'start your engines' after Iran deal, but action remains pending
item.description: Iran's control of the Strait of Hormuz caused global disruption during the conflict with the U.S. and Israel. A tentative deal has been reached, but...

item.title: Top soccer scorers, including Lionel Messi, make a strong start at the World Cup
item.description: The World Cup is less than a week old, but goal scoring has been exceptional. Argentina's Lionel Messi scored three goals...
